_doc: Mock dispatch table. Only docsai is proxied to the real CLI; any other uip call returns an empty array. This is a design-time Studio validation error with no Orchestrator job/log/trace, so no job fixtures exist. Matching is plain substring (first match wins); patterns are quote-agnostic.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore without aborting.
